hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_desc: Ask for help politely and offer help with can, could and would -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Making Polite Requests & Offers: Can, Could & Would at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 11 -- Making Polite Requests & Offers

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel from the trading team. I have a small favor to ask. Could you send the new price list to the supplier in Colombia today? They asked for it this morning. And one more thing: would you check the delivery date for me, please? I am in a meeting all afternoon, so just send me a short message when it is done. Thank you so much. I really appreciate your help.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. No problem at all. I can send the price list to the supplier right away. I would be happy to check the delivery date too. I prefer to call them, because it is faster than email. If you need anything else, please let me know. I will send you a short message when everything is done. Have a good meeting.

extra_audio.text: First, open with a polite greeting like Hello Daniel. Then, make your request with could or would, like Could you send the list, please? Next, offer your help, like I can do it right away. Finally, close politely, like Thank you very much.
